Handmade with love

My Sewing Picks

The tools & fabrics from my own sewing corner.

Welcome in! I'm the maker behind SEWING DIY PATCHWORK, where I sew bags, quilts, clothes, and cozy things for the home. Everything you'll find here is something I genuinely reach for — gathered in one place so you can find your next favorite, too.

Browse my picks Watch on YouTube
Two little collections

Find what you need

Everything is sorted into two simple shelves — the tools that make sewing easier, and the fabrics & materials I love to work with.

✂️

Tools

Rotary cutters, mats, rulers, presser feet, irons and marking pens — the trusty gear that keeps every project tidy and precise.

Explore tools →
🧵

Fabrics & Materials

Quilting fabric bundles, lace ribbon and pretty trims — the colors and textures that turn an idea into something you can hold.

Explore fabrics →
New videos often

Sew along with me

I share step-by-step tutorials for beginners and advanced sewers alike — patchwork, quilting, art quilts and everyday makes. Come say hello on the channel.

Visit SEWING DIY PATCHWORK
